---
title: "Manual and CSF based Classification of Ground Points with CloudCompare"
id: activity-analysis-4
order: 142
summary: "Manual and automatic classification and segmentation for small photogrammetric datasets using CloudCompare."
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-6
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - basic
  - optional
  - YouTube
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/activity-analysis-4.md"
---

# Manual and CSF based Classification of Ground Points with CloudCompare

Watch the workflow:

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6AOUbPi54s>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
